title: Implement MAP audit remediation batch
description: Implement the highest-priority fixes from the MAP full report: atomic task ID allocation, emergence stale reporting, event validation, git operation locking, agent availability reconciliation, intake guidance, approval calibration, and canonical repo documentation. Avoid destructive repo reconciliation or external pushes.
acceptance_criteria: Add SQLite-backed automatic task ID allocation so concurrent agents do not manually collide on task numbers
Add emergence stale/content checks for placeholder records, dangling promotion refs, and open records tied to closed tasks
Add event-log validation and alias warnings for legacy event shapes
Add non-destructive git operation lock tooling
Add agent availability reconcile reporting against hcom JSON input
Document canonical repo status and approval-calibration/intake rules
Run MAP test suite and validators
